_description: Paths exempted from validate_text_hygiene.py character-specific scans. Each list is repo-relative paths (forward slashes). em_dash / en_dash exempt the literal U+2014 / U+2013 chars; bidi exempts the U+202A-202E + U+2066-2069 Trojan Source family. Externalised from the script in wave 0.4.4 (closes review LOW-10) so adding/removing an exemption is a config edit rather than a code edit.
